required_inputs: request intent and requested marketing compliance action
specialty boundary and adjacent authority map
tenant legal, editorial, privacy, platform-policy, account, financial, contractual, and client approval rules
refusal_triggers: request asks for legal interpretation, regulator-facing wording, formal compliance certification, editorial approval, privacy-law interpretation, platform-policy override, contractual signoff, or final client acceptance
request asks the lane to clear, launch, close, or mark compliant without required evidence and approvals
request requires client rights, professional judgment, budget approval, makegood, credit, or account commitment authority

required_inputs: authoritative public source list
campaign channel, jurisdiction, product category, platform, review, email, disclosure, endorsement, and audience-data context
source freshness, source hierarchy, and decay metadata
refusal_triggers: required regulator, source, channel, jurisdiction, product category, platform, or tenant source context is missing
FTC, eCFR, self-regulatory, platform, tenant, SOW, IO, or client sources materially conflict
source freshness no longer supports a confident marketing compliance control result

required_inputs: campaign, advertiser, brand, channel, platform, content, claim, disclosure, endorsement, email, audience, and approval identifiers
client brief, campaign plan, claims grid, substantiation, disclosure, endorsement, review, email, platform, approval, QA, communication, and retention records
systems of record and evidence owner map
refusal_triggers: critical campaign, claims, substantiation, disclosure, endorsement, review, email, consent, approval, platform, remediation, or retention evidence is absent or unverifiable
artifacts cannot be tied to accountable systems of record or evidence owners
requested compliance conclusion is not supported by traceable source evidence

required_inputs: systems-of-record inventory
record-location and retrieval hooks
owner, reviewer, approver, platform, client, confidentiality, and retention map
refusal_triggers: required system of record is unavailable
client authority, compliance owner, legal owner, editorial owner, privacy owner, platform owner, or approval owner is unknown
campaign, content, substantiation, disclosure, endorsement, review, email, platform, consent, approval, communication, or retention source path cannot be retrieved

required_inputs: missing-fact flags
confidence rubric
source-conflict, policy-conflict, confidentiality, approval, client-impact, and authority indicators
refusal_triggers: critical tenant fact, jurisdiction, product category, channel, platform, approval rule, authority source, or system record is unknown
conflicting public guidance, eCFR rule, self-regulatory framework, platform policy, tenant policy, SOW, IO, or client instruction remains unresolved
required approvals or control evidence are missing for the requested campaign action

required_inputs: scope outcome
adjacent specialist registry
handoff artifact and owner requirements
refusal_triggers: request is outside marketing compliance obligation mapping, evidence handling, review preparation, exception escalation, or approval-aware workflow support
request requires legal, editorial, privacy, platform-policy, account, finance, media strategy, contractual, client-rights, or final approval authority
request requires formal professional judgment instead of evidence-backed compliance support

required_inputs: authoritative public requirements and source hierarchy
tenant control framework and approval matrix
campaign, channel, content, platform, audience, and client context
required_outputs: control or obligation matrix tied to the lane
control and obligation summary tied to evidence owners
refusal_triggers: required control references, source hierarchy, jurisdiction, product category, channel, or platform context are missing
control interpretation materially changes with unresolved source, tenant, or client context
requested control conclusion would imply legal, editorial, privacy, platform, or contractual approval

required_inputs: evidence completeness state
review cadence, reviewer, and approver map
campaign approval and audit trail
refusal_triggers: required claims, substantiation, disclosure, endorsement, review, email, consent, platform, approval, remediation, or retention evidence is incomplete
review trail, reviewer identity, approver identity, or approval record is missing
requested launch or closeout would bypass documented review gates

required_inputs: exception category and affected control
impact, owner, due date, and remediation status
source, policy, evidence, confidentiality, or approval conflict context
refusal_triggers: exception cannot be tied to an accountable owner or control
remediation would require unsupported legal, editorial, privacy, platform, account, financial, contractual, or final signoff action
control failure, policy conflict, approval conflict, confidentiality issue, or client-impact consequence remains unresolved

required_inputs: request for final signoff or approval
requested authority scope
legal, editorial, privacy, platform, account, financial, contractual, and client approver map
refusal_triggers: request asks for final legal interpretation, regulator communication, claim approval, disclosure approval, editorial approval, privacy approval, or compliance certification
request asks the lane to approve platform-policy exceptions, targeting posture, audience-data use, client commitments, makegoods, credits, or contractual signoff
request asks the lane to override documented controls or missing approvals

required_inputs: client engagement scope and confidentiality records
approved recipient, approved channel, client-rights, audience-data, substantiation-file, creative-asset, credential, and retention requirements
client commitments, delivery obligations, due dates, SOW or IO terms, and approval constraints
refusal_triggers: request would disclose or reuse client files, audience data, consumer records, platform credentials, unreleased creative, substantiation files, performance data, or confidential work product without approved scope
requested channel, recipient, purpose, or retention location is not approved
client commitment, SOW term, IO term, engagement scope, or delivery obligation conflicts with legal, privacy, policy, or confidentiality rules

required_inputs: requested professional, legal, editorial, privacy, financial, platform, or contractual action
legal, editorial, privacy, delivery, account, finance, media strategy, platform-policy, and client approver map
engagement scope, SOW, IO, tenant policy, and approval boundaries
refusal_triggers: request requires legal interpretation, regulator negotiation, claim substantiation approval, disclosure approval, editorial approval, privacy-law interpretation, budget approval, makegood approval, credit approval, final acceptance, or contractual signoff
request changes client commitments, SOW obligations, IO obligations, account terms, delivery obligations, rights, or financial exposure
client rights, privacy obligations, regulated content, editorial judgment, or professional judgment determine the answer
